name: Creamy Stuffed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub potatoes thoroughly and rub the skins with oil. Bake at 400 degrees for 1 hour to 1-1/4 hours or until cooked.
2. Allow to cool to touch. Slice skin away from top of each potato. Carefully scoop out pulp, leaving shells intact. Mash the pulp.
3. Cook bacon until crisp. Drain and crumble, reserving 3 tablespoons drippings in skillet. Sauté onion in bacon drippings until tender.
4. Combine potato pulp, bacon, onion, cheese, sour cream, salt, and pepper, mixing well. Stuff shells with potato mixture. Sprinkle each with 1/8 teaspoon paprika.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 to 20 minutes or until heated thoroughly.
